gate.exception: The 250 KB/1 MB target is not yet feasible while shipping the documented standalone CLI/MCP tooling, deterministic change-integrity surfaces, schemas, and consumer guidance. The post-3.1 cycle recalibrates once from the measured Linux candidate (427,528 packed bytes, 1,445,621 unpacked bytes, 128 files) with at least 10% headroom: 471,000 packed bytes, 1,591,000 unpacked bytes, and 141 files. Legacy migration/demo and experimental-runtime hardening guides remain repository-hosted, source maps were removed in V04, and this exception must be reconsidered before ArkGate 4.
